tasks.description: Scaffold PythonGenerator class inheriting BaseGenerator with framework_name='python' and stub abstract methods.
Implement Python type mapping (_TYPE_MAP, _python_type, _python_nullable) mirroring _TYPE_MAP / _php_type / _php_nullable.
Implement _optional_check_expr returning '<expr> is not None'.

Implement copy_module: delegate to _copy_module_files(module_root, 'python', module_name, output_dir), then strip pyproject.toml, setup.py, setup.cfg, tests/, dist/, __pycache__/ from the copied tree.

Implement discover_module_exports: parse copied module's __init__.py; return name list from __all__ if present, else parsed `from .X import Y` statements. Each export dict: {name, source_module, kind}.
Implement emit_reexports: return None (Python re-exports are written into mediaviz_sdk/__init__.py by generate(), not a standalone barrel file).
Implement emit_errors_file writing mediaviz_sdk/errors.py with ApiError, ValidationError, NotFoundError, RateLimitError, ServerError, and handle_response(raw, status, headers).
Implement _python_body_sig_tokens — body params in required-first order for method signatures across all four shapes (scalar/expanded/flat_dict/generic).
Implement _python_body_build returning (preamble_lines, body_expr) for body assembly across shapes. Uses {k:v for k,v in {...}.items() if v is not None} to drop nulls for expanded bodies.
Implement _render_object_tree_python to emit a nested dict literal with null-filtering comprehensions, matching _render_object_tree_php.
Implement _build_path — path param substitution using f-strings with quote(str(<param>), safe='') and conditional query string assembly via httpx.QueryParams or urlencode.
Implement _emit_auth_method — calls self._ctx.client.request(path, method, access_token, refresh_token, body) and returns result.data.
Implement _emit_unauth_method — inline httpx.Client() with-block, calls handle_response(resp.text, resp.status_code, dict(resp.headers)).
Implement _emit_alt_host_method — resolves host via self._ctx.require_host, builds Authorization + custom headers, inline httpx.Client() call, handle_response.
Implement _emit_method dispatcher routing to auth/unauth/alt-host based on ep['auth'] and ep['api_host'].
Implement emit_controller_file writing one snake_case controller file per group, class named via snake_to_pascal, with __init__(self, ctx) and one method per endpoint + composite.
Implement _resolve_python_expr and _resolve_python_expr_loop for composite expression resolution (params.*, steps.*, loop_var.*).
Implement _emit_python_once_step with optional step-cache guard (self._<step_id>_cache[key]).
Implement _emit_python_call_auth (auth + no alt-host, used inside composites).
Implement _emit_python_inline_httpx (unauth + alt-host inline httpx call, used inside composites).
Implement _emit_python_foreach_step with on_error ('abort'/'continue'/'collect') handling via try/except.
Implement _emit_composite_method: signature, step execution, optional {'results': ..., 'errors': ...} return envelope for collect mode.

Implement emit_client_class writing mediaviz_sdk/client.py with _Context, _TokenTrackingClient, and MediaVizClient (constructor with env-var fallbacks for client_id/secret/base_url/redirect_uri + per-host MEDIAVIZ_<HOST>_URL, authenticate, get_authorization_url, handle_callback, set_tokens).
Implement emit_init_file writing mediaviz_sdk/__init__.py with re-exports: MediaVizClient, error classes, and all names discovered from copied oauth_sdk module (via self._copied_modules).

Implement emit_pyproject_toml writing pyproject.toml at output_dir with project metadata, version parsed from trailing vX.Y.Z segment of output_dir, httpx dep, and [tool.setuptools] packages=['mediaviz_sdk', 'oauth_sdk'].

Wire generate() to orchestrate: mkdir mediaviz_sdk/, emit errors.py, iterate groups for controller files, emit client.py, emit pyproject.toml, then emit __init__.py (after reexport_all_modules has populated self._copied_modules).
Smoke-test generator: run `python generate.py --endpoints basic_sdk_flow_endpoints --frameworks python`, then `pip install -e sdk/vX.Y.Z/python` in a scratch venv and import MediaVizClient.

touch_points.status: done — fixed copy_module (inner pkg), _pascal_to_snake normalization, OAuthClientConfig instantiation
done — fixed sys.executable, controller snake normalization

tasks.description: Scaffold PythonTestGenerator class inheriting BaseTestGenerator with framework_name='python' and stub generate/run methods.
Implement emit_helpers writing test_helpers.py with SpyOAuthClient subclass recording calls and returning canned AuthenticatedResponse.
Implement emit_conftest writing conftest.py with sys.path insertion for the generated SDK + fixtures spy_client and mv_client.
Implement emit_pytest_config writing pyproject.toml declaring pytest + httpx deps and [tool.pytest.ini_options] testpaths.
Implement emit_errors_test writing test_errors.py asserting 422→ValidationError, 404→NotFoundError, 429→RateLimitError, 5xx→ServerError, other→ApiError.

Implement emit_controller_test writing test_<controller>.py with one pytest function per endpoint: builds expected path/query via base helpers, invokes method, asserts spy's recorded call matches for auth endpoints.
Implement unauth/alt-host test emission using httpx.MockTransport injected via monkeypatch of httpx.Client, asserting URL, method, headers, body.
Implement body fixture builder for each request_body shape using TEST_VALUES (required-first, preserving orig_path nesting for expanded).
Implement generate() wiring: mkdir, emit_helpers, emit_conftest, emit_pytest_config, emit_errors_test, iterate groups emitting controller tests.
Implement run(test_dir) executing `python -m pytest -v` via subprocess, parsing pytest summary line for total/passed/failed counts, returning TestResult.
End-to-end verification: rerun `python generate.py --endpoints basic_sdk_flow_endpoints --frameworks python`, confirm pytest suite executes and reports all-pass via PythonTestGenerator.run.

touch_points.status: done — 8/8 pass; drives generate.main() + PythonTestGenerator.run() with synthetic flow

tasks.description: Update package spec.md and implementation_plan.md at package root to reference the new python framework.

touch_points.status: done — added python.py to architecture, naming table, error table, constraints
done — created; lists all frameworks with python marked complete
